name: Par 3 Simulator

setup.description: Pick a target 150-180 yards out. Play 9 balls, one at a time, as if each were its own par 3 hole.

rules.description: Play 9 balls to the same target, treating each shot like a fresh hole. Reset your routine between every ball.
scoring: 1 point per ball that finishes on the green

caption: Nine holes, one club, zero mulligans. Play it like it counts. #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
